title: Disc+
description: Adds More Discs To The Game. Just Miku And Teto For Now
body:
Do you feel like there is no good and easily obtainable music discs?
Well i have the mod for you. This mod combines minecraft with new good songs!

Songs In The Mod:
Soren Theme [Minecraft_ Story Mode 103 OST]
Minecon Trailer (UNRELEASED) [Minecraft Story Mode OST]
Reuben [Minecraft: Story Mode 101 OST]
Order of the Stone [Minecraft_ Story Mode 101 OST]
Automatic Chicken Farm [Minecraft_ Story Mode 101 OST]
Training Montage [Minecraft_ Story Mode 101 OST]



This mod is lag FREE! Yes you heard me. this mod provides no lag! isnt that great.

if you want your song suggestions into this mod email me at sincentvooner@gmail.com

This mod will be for more versions soon like:
Forge, Fabric and Quilt!

Supported versions right now:
Neoforge 1.21.1
